data.title: Ingram Micro launches an AI hub and bolsters ecommerce
data.description: Ingram Micro is also enhancing its support for resellers and vendors in the ecommerce space by offering a comprehensive suite of API-driven solutions and digital tools.

data.title: B2B distributors brace for tariff impact with strategic shifts
data.description: B2B distributors, including Beacon Roofing Supply, Grainger, Fastenal, MSC Industrial, and Global Industrial, are deploying a combination of inventory management, supplier diversification, pricing adjustments, and operational enhancements to navigate the challenges posed by tariffs.

data.title: GigaCloud unveils mobile app to boost retail sales and training
data.description: The Wonder App is part of GigaCloud’s broader GIGA IQ platform, which integrates B2B and B2C tools to support digital and physical retail operations.

data.title: Beyond sells major stake in Zulily for $5 million
data.description: Despite the change in ownership, Zulily isn’t going away. The brand will continue to operate under its existing name, with a relaunch of its ecommerce platform planned in the coming months, according to the CEO of Proozy, which now owns the brand.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: What agentic commerce means for online retail
data.description: As online retailers begin testing agentic AI for their ecommerce needs, shoppers are already trying it out using subscriptions as business leverage agents on the backends of their websites.
